app_descriptions.short_description: AI-powered governance gate for controlled agent execution and compliance
app_descriptions.long_description: DSG Governance Gate provides deterministic policy evaluation, runtime compliance tracking, and evidence collection for AI agent operations. It integrates with Stripe to control access and governance of AI services.
app_descriptions.pricing_statement: DSG Governance Gate is free and open-source software. No additional fees are charged through this Stripe integration. Users pay only for their existing Stripe charges, with no markup or service fees applied by this app.

permissions.purpose: Read charge details for governance decisions
